ExtraProperties.Name: ApplicantCertifyCheckbox
ExtraProperties.Label: I certify that I have read, understand, and agree to the Authorization and Waiver information above, and all given statements are true and correct to the best of my knowledge.

ExtraProperties.Name: AuthorizationandWaiver
ExtraProperties.Label: Authorization and Waiver
ExtraProperties.Text:
1.      Southern California Edison Company (“SCE”) and Southern California Gas Company (“SoCalGas”) (individually, “party” and collectively “parties”), each a California Investor-Owned Utility (individually, an “IOU” and collectively, the “IOUs”), may modify or discontinue the Pilot Plus/ Deep initiative, herein referred to as the Energy Savings Assistance (“ESA”) Whole Home Program (“Program”) at any time in their sole discretion, without prior notice, or by order of the California Public Utilities Commission (“CPUC”). The Program is funded by California utility customers and administered by the IOUs under the auspices of the CPUC and are subject to the availability of funds.

2.     As the Applicant,

a.      I certify that I meet the Program eligibility requirements and that the information regarding household members and income I have provided in this Application is true and correct. Upon request, I agree to provide proof of gross household income.

b.      I authorize the IOUs and their authorized contractor(s) (“Contractor(s)”) to examine my employment, utility account, and other information pertinent to this application.

c.       I understand and agree that this application contains the entire application between the parties, and that no other agreement, statement, or promise made by any party shall be binding or valid.

d.      I hereby waive any claim to Local, State or Federal tax credits, utility cash rebates, or any other utility incentives with respect to any measures, improvements, and services installed on the premise pursuant to the Program (“Measures”).

3.     I understand that if I qualify and am approved for participation,

a.      I grant permission to the IOUs and the Contractor(s) to access the property to provide all feasible Measures, including outlet grounding (the “Work”) as determined necessary by the IOUs and their Contractor(s) pursuant to the terms and conditions of the Program.

b.      I hereby authorize the contractor(s) to perform the Work to ensure that the outlet is correctly grounded and understand that said Work will be completed at minimal to no charge to me.

c.       I grant permission to the IOUs, IOU-authorized inspection contractor(s), city, county, state or municipal building inspectors and any other authorized program representative access (“third parties”) the property to perform Program services. I understand that failure to comply with the inspection process may create a safety concern and may void the manufacturer’s warranty. If a building permit is required to complete installation of the Measures, I agree to allow all required inspections to occur. If I do not grant reasonable access necessary to third parties to complete such inspections or if I refuse to allow such inspections to occur, I understand that I will be responsible for all costs, penalties, and fees that the permitting jurisdiction may levy upon the property as a result of my failure to permit such inspections to occur.

4.      For Renter/Tenants:

a.      I understand that, except as set forth herein, all approved Measures under the Program will be paid-for by the Program. If I (the Applicant) am a renter/tenant and do not own the existing appliance, the property owner may be required to pay a non-refundable co-payment to the Contractor for certain Measures. The Contractor(s) will inform the Applicant in advance which Measures, if any, require a co-payment to be made by the property owner. I understand that any required non-refundable co-payment will be made directly to the Contractor(s), and that the IOUs will not receive any part of the co-payment. I understand that the Contractor(s) is/are not obligated to install any Measure for which a co-payment is required but not received by the property owner.

NOTE: Renters/Tenants are not permitted to make the co-payment on behalf of the property owner.

b.      I understand and agree that a completed Property Owner’s Authorization (“POA”) form will be required prior to any Work being performed. This POA will be obtained directly from the property owner by the Contractor.

c.       If I do not own the original appliance(s) that are being replaced by a new Measure pursuant to the Program, I agree not to remove the newly installed Measure(s) from the premises, including when I move or relocate.

5.     I acknowledge and agree that the IOUs shall not be liable for any damages or losses arising out of any act or omission of Contractor(s) or any subcontractor of Contractor(s) in performing the Work, and I hereby release the IOUs from and against, and waive as against the IOUs, any and all claims that may arise in connection with the Work.

6.     I agree to hold the contractor(s) solely responsible for the performance of the Work and for any and all claims, losses, liabilities, damages, and expenses (including attorneys’ fees and costs) that may arise as a result of the Work.

7.      Furthermore, I shall defend, indemnify, and hold harmless the IOUs and its respective officers and employees against any and all action, liability, damages, demands or costs, for injury to or death or any and all persons whatsoever, and for any and all damage to property, in any manner arising from, or in connection with, the performance of the Work hereunder, except for the damages caused solely by the gross negligence or willful misconduct of the IOUs.

8.     I acknowledge and agree that the IOUs has not authorized any services, improvements, installations, or equipment other than the Measures (which may include outlet grounding), and I understand that the IOUs assume no liability for such services, improvements, installations, or equipment. I acknowledge and agree that the IOUs make no representations or covenants as to the safety, reliability and/or efficiency of the Measures.

9.      I acknowledge and agree that the information and materials provided as part of the Energy Education are for informational purposes only.

10.  Neither SCE nor SoCalGas makes any warranty, whether expressed or implied, including but not limited to the warranty of merchantability or fitness for any particular purpose, use or application of the material and information provided as part of the Energy Education and Measures.

11.  In order to make the Program more cost-effective and offer it to as many qualified customers as possible, the IOUs and the Contractor(s) purchase high-quality, Energy Star® qualified products (where applicable). As a result, the Program offers customers a limited number of energy-efficient models to help reduce energy bills. Replacement units may not be equipped with the same features as the existing units. At the time of installation, the Contractor(s) will provide written warranty information and instructions specific to each Measure installed.

12.  I acknowledge that the Contractor(s), both for Installation and Inspection, have been authorized by the IOUs to contact me only regarding the performance of the Work. Additionally, I acknowledge that an authorized Program Evaluator may contact me by mail, email, or telephone for survey purposes related to the Program, the completion of the Work, interactions with contractors, and/or the Measures provided to me.

13.   I understand that this Application is confidential, but I acknowledge that my personal information may be collected and shared with and serve as authorization to participate in other assistance programs such as California Alternate Rates for Energy (“CARE”), Family Electric Rate Assistance (“FERA”), Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (“LIHEAP”) or other low-income or energy efficiency programs managed by the IOUs, state and federal agencies, other utilities, or utility suppliers.

14.   My signature on this application certifies my desire and consent to participate in the Program. I understand that I may cancel at any time prior to the installation of Measure(s) without penalty or obligation. Additionally, I understand NO LIEN WILL BE PLACED AGAINST THIS PROPERTY.

15.   I acknowledge and agree that my e-mail address and/or SMS enabled phone number may be used to receive information related to my participation in the Program and I may choose to opt-out at any time by replying to the Program email or SMS.

16.   I understand that should I have any questions regarding the installed Measure(s), the Contractor(s), or any item contained on this form, that I may contact Contractor Customer Support at 888-438-5497 between 8:00 A.M. and 5:00 P.M. (PT) Monday through Friday for additional information.

17.    For information on privacy policies and California Consumer Privacy Act (“CCPA”) compliance, please visit www.sce.com/privacy or www.socalgas.com/privacy-center.

ExtraProperties.Name: CAREFERAConsent
ExtraProperties.Text: I give my consent to both SCE and SoCalGas to share the information contained in this document with the Discount Rate Programs (CARE/FERA). If I am not already on the California Alternate Rate for Energy (CARE) or Family Electric Rate Assistance (FERA) rate, I understand that I may receive a discount on my electric and/or gas bill(s) if I meet certain income guidelines. If I am enrolled on the CARE or FERA rate through this process, I agree to provide proof of income if asked by either SCE or SoCalGas and to inform, as relevant, SCE or SoCalGas if I no longer qualify. I also understand that if I receive the CARE or FERA rate without meeting the qualifications, I may be required to pay back the discounts I received.
